scripts.setup: npm install --prefix apps/editor && cd apps/server && bun install
scripts.start: concurrently --names "IMAGE,SERVER,EDITOR" --prefix-colors "yellow,green,magenta" "cd apps/image-router/server && bun run dev" "cd apps/server && bun run src/index.ts" "cd apps/editor && npm run dev"
scripts.start:no-image: concurrently --names "SERVER,EDITOR" --prefix-colors "green,magenta" "cd apps/server && bun run src/index.ts" "cd apps/editor && npm run dev"
